name: Sausage & Peppers
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown Italian sausage (about 2 pounds) in a skillet or under the broiler until browned, then drain off fat and let cool slightly.
2. In a large bowl or container, mix chopped onions and peppers with minced garlic if desired.
3. Place vegetables into the crockpot.
4. Add cut-up sausage pieces to the crockpot.
5. Pour tomato sauce over the contents of the crockpot and sprinkle with oregano and basil.
6. Cook on low for 6-7 hours, or until the sausage is tender.
7. Serve in sub rolls, hamburger buns, or over rice.
2. Barbecued Beef
1. Season a small pot roast with salt and pepper if desired, then place it in the crockpot.
2. Cover the roast with barbecue sauce.
3. Add more barbecue sauce near the end of cooking to prevent flavor loss or after slicing the roast.
4. Remove the roast from the crockpot once cooked and slice into thin pieces (or shred).
5. Serve on hamburger buns. Good with baked beans and salad.
